summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Squash Coach dashboard. App renders correctly with proper authentication flow, responsive design, and correct API endpoint configuration.

design_issues.issue: Mobile bottom navigation not clearly identifiable in current state - may need verification with authenticated user

passed_tests: Login page renders correctly with brand colors (black, yellow, gray)
Login form functionality (email, password, submit button)
Register page renders with all required fields (name, email, password, phone)
Navigation between login and register pages works
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login
API calls go to correct external endpoint (https://lev.jsb.mybluehost.me:8001)
Logo and footer elements display correctly
Form validation and user feedback systems in place
action_item_for_main_agent: App is working correctly for unauthenticated users. To complete testing, would need valid credentials from the mobile app to test authenticated flows (dashboard, matches, analysis, etc.). Consider adding data-testid attributes for mobile navigation elements for better testability.
